MATTER ON CALENDAR, THURSDAY, JUNE 24, 2010. FRANCISCO GUTIERREZ APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, SUTTON FUNDING LLC. PLAINTIFF SUTTON FUNDING LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY BY DEFENDANT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT TO RESPOND BY JUNE 28, 2010. MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED.

PLAINTIFF SUTTON FUNDING, LLC's, Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena By Ana Delgado is off calendar at the request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Sutton Funding LLC is present. Represented by Mary Lou Castellanos.
Attorney, Francisco Gutierrez, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Lilian Rivas,is present.
Attorney, Eileen O'Keeffe, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Ulmer, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 218, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of AUG-23-2010 remains on calendar.

MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. PLAINTIFF SUTTON FUNDING LLC's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery From Defendant Stephanie Woo, And Request For Monetary Sanctions is taken off calendar. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Compel Resposns To Discovery From Defts And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Matter on calendar, Thursday, June 24, 2010. Francisco Gutierrez appearing for Plaintiff, Sutton Funding LLC. PLAINTIFF SUTTON FUNDING LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery By Defendant is granted. Defendant to respond by June 28, 2010. Sanctions are awarded against the defendant in the amount of $540.00. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr., not reported (612).
